title: Section 2
content: Whereas the objects of the institution mentioned in 1[the First Schedule, the Second Schedule and the Third Schedule] are such as to make them Institutions of national importance, it is hereby declared that each such institute is an Institution of national importance.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 9 of 2014, s. 2, for "the First Schedule and the Second Schedule" (w.e.f. 4-3-2014).
